x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that applies taxes directly to the income or earnings of the customer.

Comment:
Example:

Withholding tax on interest earned from a savings account.

Tax on dividends received from investment products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Indirect Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that applies taxes on transactions, purchases, or service usage rather than directly on income.

Comment:
Example:

VAT or GST applied to banking service fees.

Sales tax applied on financial product purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withholding Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature where the bank deducts tax at source on specific earnings before disbursing funds to the customer.

Comment:
Example:

Deducting tax on interest payments or fixed deposit maturity amounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deferred Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Deferred / Exempt Tax Feature: A feature that delays taxation or exempts certain transactions or earnings from immediate tax liability.

Comment:
Example:

Tax-deferred retirement accounts (interest accrues without immediate taxation).

Certain government bonds that are tax-exempt.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction-Based Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that calculates tax per individual financial transaction.

Comment:
Example:

Tax applied to fund transfers above a certain threshold.

Stamp duty applied on securities purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Reporting Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A feature that ensures the banking product generates reports for tax compliance and submission to authorities.

Comment:
Example:

Annual statements of interest income for tax filing.

Reports for withholding taxes deducted at source.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Progressive Tax Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tiered / Progressive Tax Feature: A feature that applies tax rates based on thresholds, tiers, or progressive scales.

Comment:
Example:

Interest income taxed at different rates depending on total annual interest.

Progressive tax on large transactions or high account balances.
